fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 61st Electron Mission, Second Launch for iQPS
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab successfully launched its 61st Electron mission, deploying the QPS-SAR-9 spacecraft for iQPS, marking the second launch for the Japanese customer.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Demonstrates Rocket Lab's growing capabilities and reliability in the small satellite launch market, reinforcing its competitive position.

fundamental_news.headline: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 60th Electron Mission for BlackSky
fundamental_news.summary: Rocket Lab launched its 60th Electron mission, deploying BlackSky's first Gen-3 satellite, enhancing BlackSky's Earth-imaging capabilities.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Highlights Rocket Lab's consistent performance and ability to meet client needs, bolstering its reputation and market share.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for today, February 25, 2026.; reconciled_from_news

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit CEO Huffman Sells $4.15 Million in RDDT Stock
fundamental_news.summary: Reddit CEO Steve Huffman sold 17,990 shares of Reddit's Class A Common Stock on December 31, 2025, totaling $4.15 million, with prices ranging from $229.07 to $233.52 per share.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Insider selling can signal potential concerns or personal financial planning; however, without additional context, it does not necessarily impact the long-term investment thesis.

fundamental_news.headline: Reddit Reports Q4 2025 Earnings, Announces $1 Billion Share Repurchase Program
fundamental_news.summary: Reddit announced its Q4 2025 earnings, reporting an EPS of $1.24, surpassing analyst expectations of $0.96, and revenue of $725.61 million, a 69.7% year-over-year increase. The company also announced a $1 billion share repurchase program.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The strong earnings and share repurchase program indicate financial health and shareholder value enhancement, supporting a positive long-term investment thesis.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for April 30, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Axon Enterprise Reports Q4 2025 Financial Results
fundamental_news.summary: Axon reported Q4 2025 revenue of $797 million, up 39% year-over-year, with annual recurring revenue surpassing $1.3 billion, a 35% increase from the previous year. The company introduced new products, including Axon Vehicle Intelligence and Axon Assistant, and set ambitious targets for 2026 and 2028, aiming for $6 billion in annual revenue by 2028.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The strong financial performance and strategic product launches reinforce Axon's position in the public safety technology sector, supporting its long-term growth trajectory.

fundamental_news.headline: Axon Enterprise to Acquire Prepared, Enhancing 911 Response Capabilities
fundamental_news.summary: Axon announced a definitive agreement to acquire Prepared, an AI-powered emergency communications platform, aiming to enhance its 911 response capabilities and integrate AI-driven communications into its public safety ecosystem.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The acquisition aligns with Axon's strategy to expand its product offerings and strengthen its competitive moat in the public safety technology market.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for May 7, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Micron Rides Record HBM Demand And US$200b AI Expansion Plans
fundamental_news.summary: Micron Technology is experiencing unprecedented demand for high bandwidth memory (HBM) products, leading to sold-out 2026 production capacity. The company plans to invest at least $200 billion in new U.S. manufacturing facilities, supported by significant government subsidies, focusing on higher-margin AI and enterprise memory over lower-margin consumer segments.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This substantial investment and focus on AI and enterprise memory align with Micron's strategy to strengthen its position in the high-growth AI and data center markets, enhancing its competitive moat and long-term growth prospects.

fundamental_news.headline: Micron Technology to Report Fiscal Fourth Quarter Results and Full Fiscal Year 2025 on September 23, 2025
fundamental_news.summary: Micron Technology announced it will hold its fiscal fourth quarter and full fiscal year earnings conference call on September 23, 2025, at 2:30 p.m. Mountain time, to discuss financial results and future outlook.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The upcoming earnings report will provide insights into Micron's financial performance and strategic direction, which are crucial for assessing the company's long-term investment thesis.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for April 1, 2026, which will provide further insights into Micron's financial performance and strategic initiatives.

fundamental_news.headline: Planet Labs Chief Strategist to Present at Citi Global Tech Conference
fundamental_news.summary: Robert Cardillo, Chief Strategist and Chairman of Planet Federal, will participate in a fireside chat at Citi’s 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference, discussing strategic initiatives and partnerships.

fundamental_news.headline: Planet Labs Extends Contract with Taylor Geospatial Institute Through 2026
fundamental_news.summary: Planet Labs has extended its contract to provide data to the Taylor Geospatial Institute (TGI) into 2026, enabling TGI to leverage Planet's data products for geospatial research and solutions.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This extension solidifies Planet Labs' position as a key data provider for geospatial research, enhancing its reputation and potential for long-term growth in the geospatial data market.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for February 28, 2026.

fundamental_news.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Loads Up 3.33 Million IREN Shares
fundamental_news.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald, L.P. disclosed the acquisition of 3,333,423 additional shares of IREN, increasing its position to 1.99% of its 13F assets under management. This significant investment reflects confidence in IREN's strategic direction and growth prospects.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: The substantial investment by a reputable financial firm underscores confidence in IREN's transition to AI cloud services and its potential for long-term growth, reinforcing the company's competitive moat in the AI infrastructure sector.

earnings_timeline.notes: The upcoming earnings report will provide insights into IREN's financial performance and progress in its AI cloud expansion.

fundamental_news.headline: Lundin Gold Sells Silver Stream to LunR Royalties in $490M Deal
fundamental_news.summary: Lundin Gold has agreed to sell a silver stream from its Fruta del Norte mine to LunR Royalties for approximately $490 million, enhancing LunR's position in the precious metals royalty sector.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: This strategic transaction strengthens LunR's portfolio, potentially increasing its cash flow and market competitiveness, which could positively impact its long-term growth prospects.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is scheduled for March 24, 2026, and is expected to provide insights into the company's financial performance and strategic initiatives.

fundamental_news.headline: Pony AI Inc. to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results on March 25, 2025
fundamental_news.summary: Pony AI has scheduled its earnings release for Q4 and full year 2024, with a conference call on March 25, 2025.
fundamental_news.why_it_matters: Upcoming earnings reports provide insights into the company's financial health and progress toward its strategic goals, informing long-term investment decisions.

earnings_timeline.notes: The next earnings report is anticipated to provide further insights into the company's financial trajectory and operational progress.
CrowdStrike reported strong Q3 FY2026 results, with revenue exceeding expectations by 22% year-over-year to $1.23 billion.
